---
title: "Statistical Data Analysis: Course Index"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# Lecture Slides

- [Lecture 1. Motivation and course overview](lecture-01-introduction.qmd)
- [Lecture 2. Probability and Bayes' theorem](lecture-02-probability-bayes.qmd)
- [Lecture 3. Random variables and probability densities](lecture-03-random-variables-and-densities.qmd)
- [Lecture 4. Expectation values and error propagation](lecture-04-expectation-and-error-propagation.qmd)
- [Lecture 5. Common probability distributions](lecture-05-common-probability-distributions.qmd)
- [Lecture 6. The Monte Carlo method](lecture-06-monte-carlo-method.qmd)
- [Lecture 7. Statistical tests: general concepts](lecture-07-statistical-tests-basics.qmd)
- [Lecture 8. Test statistics and multivariate methods](lecture-08-test-statistics-and-multivariate-methods.qmd)
- [Lecture 9. Goodness-of-fit, p-values, significance, discovery and exclusion](lecture-09-goodness-of-fit-and-significance.qmd)
- [Lecture 10. Feldman-Cousins, CLs, and related methods](lecture-10-feldman-cousins-and-cls.qmd)
- [Lecture 11. Parameter estimation and maximum likelihood](lecture-11-parameter-estimation-and-maximum-likelihood.qmd)
- [Lecture 12. Method of least squares](lecture-12-method-of-least-squares.qmd)
- [Lecture 13. Interval estimation and setting limits](lecture-13-interval-estimation-and-limits.qmd)
- [Lecture 14. Nuisance parameters and systematic uncertainties](lecture-14-nuisance-parameters-and-systematics.qmd)
- [Lecture 15. Examples of Bayesian approach](lecture-15-bayesian-examples.qmd)

## Build

Render the full slides site:

```bash
quarto render slides
```

For OJS slides, open through HTTP (not `file://`):

```bash
quarto preview slides
```

or:

```bash
cd slides/_site
python3 -m http.server 8000
```
